canonical-research.description: Maintained paper or research memo with citations, equations, claim boundaries, sidecars, or explicit artifact provenance.

current-development.description: Still-valid implementation guidance, active contract, runbook, architecture note, or engineering plan.

synthetic-research.description: Generated research-style material, prompt output, exploratory sweep, or speculative memo useful as synthetic data.

legacy-development.description: Historical or superseded implementation note, old patch plan, failed approach, stale checkpoint, or outdated roadmap.

equation-action-whitepaper.description: Markdown whitepaper kept beside Calculator/equation-action sidecars.

folderRules.reason: Curated research papers and maintained research references.
Paper-oriented references that should sit with curated research.
Generated or audit-style research packets useful as synthetic research data unless promoted explicitly.
Generated knowledge-tree and evidence artifacts used as structured synthetic research context.
Exploratory curvature-study outputs that are useful context but not promoted canonical papers.
Generated ladder-pack material used as synthetic knowledge data.
Generated society/template material used as synthetic knowledge data.
Generated ladder-pack material used as synthetic knowledge data.
Generated society/template material used as synthetic knowledge data.
Architecture decision records for active engineering context.
Agent-facing implementation and operations notes.
Architecture notes and contracts for the active codebase.
Current development notes promoted from the docs audit.
Active ethos and ideology contract material.
Experiment notes that support active implementation decisions.
Active Helix Ask contracts and tool documentation.
Quality and test planning for active development.
Renderer implementation notes.
Operational runbooks for active workflows.
Active specifications and contracts.
Active StarSim implementation notes.
Active voice workflow documentation.
Historical audit and development trail retained for context unless a narrower rule promotes it.
Explicit legacy development notes promoted from the docs audit.
